questions.question: 1 (a) Find the direction in which Q is travelling, giving your answer as a bearing. (2) The boats are modelled as particles. At time t = 0 , P is at the origin O and Q is at the point with position vector 200j m. At time t seconds, the position vector of P is p m and the position vector of Q is q m. parts.text: 1 (a) Find the direction in which Q is travelling, giving your answer as a bearing. (2) The boats are modelled as particles. At time t = 0 , P is at the origin O and Q is at the point with position vector 200j m. At time t seconds, the position vector of P is p m and the position vector of Q is q m. (b) Show that PQ → = [5ti + (200 – 20t)j] m (5) (c) Find the bearing of P from Q when t =
